licenseNotes: Treat each linked project independently. Do not copy proprietary assets or protected copy. Extract general principles only when the source license allows it.
extractedSignals: Design docs should expose explicit system rules, not only marketing screenshots.
Good design docs connect foundations, components, usage guidance, examples, and governance.
D-ZINE profiles must preserve source provenance so generated taste contracts are inspectable.
